authored.para: This instruction computes the minimum value of each pair of adjacent floating-point elements within each source vector, and interleaves the results from corresponding lanes. The interleaved result values are destructively placed in the first source vector.
When FPCR.AH is 0, the behavior is as follows for each pairwise operation:

listitem.content: Negative zero compares less than positive zero.
When FPCR.DN is 0, if either element is a NaN, the result is a quiet NaN.
When FPCR.DN is 1, if either element is a NaN, the result is Default NaN.

authored.para: When FPCR.AH is 1, the behavior is as follows for each pairwise operation:

listitem.content: If both elements are zeros, regardless of the sign of either zero, the result is the second element.
If either element is a NaN, regardless of the value of FPCR.DN, the result is the second element.

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction might be immediately preceded in program order by a MOVPRFX instruction. The MOVPRFX must conform to all of the following requirements, otherwise the behavior of the MOVPRFX and this instruction is CONSTRAINED UNPREDICTABLE:

listitem.content: The MOVPRFX must specify the same destination register as this instruction.
The destination register must not refer to architectural register state referenced by any other source operand register of this instruction.

a.hover: Is the name of the first source and destination scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zdn" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the name of the first source and destination scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zdn" field.
Is the name of the second source scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zm" field.

ps.name: A64.sve.sve_fp_pairwise.sve_fp_pairwise.fminp_z_p_zz_

intro.para: Is the name of the first source and destination scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zdn" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the name of the second source scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zm" field.

ps.name: A64.sve.sve_fp_pairwise.sve_fp_pairwise.fminp_z_p_zz_
